fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Source
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source for the cost budget register.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description that further explains the cost budget register.

fields.name: From Budget Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first general ledger budget entry number in the register if the budget posting is transferred from the general ledger budget.

fields.name: To Budget Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last budget entry number to be used in the line.

fields.name: From Cost Budget Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first general ledger budget entry number in the register if the cost budget posting is transferred from the general ledger budget.

fields.name: To Cost Budget Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last cost budget entry number to be used in the line.

fields.name: No. of Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of entries in the cost budget register.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transferred and allocated cost budget entries.

fields.name: Processed Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the cost budget register was last updated.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the cost has been closed.

fields.name: Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies by which level the cost allocation posting is done. For example, this makes sure that costs are allocated at level 1 from the ADM cost center to the WORKSHOP and PROD cost centers, before they are allocated at level 2 from the PROD cost center to the FURNITURE, CHAIRS, and PAINT cost objects.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch, a personalized journal layout, that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: Cost Budget Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the cost budget.
